title: Extend grouped UI to timeline views
description: Extend the grouped view mode (author-grouped post display with filtering) from NIP-05 domain feeds to general timeline views. Should reuse the grouped list view components (NIP05GroupedListView, NIP05GroupedAuthorRow) and filter settings, adapting them for timeline context.

title: Investigate if grouped view makes sense in universe view
description: Research and evaluate whether the grouped view mode would be useful in the universe view. Consider: volume of posts (universe is high-traffic), UX implications of grouping unknown authors, performance with large datasets, and whether WOT filtering in grouped mode adds value for universe discovery.
close_reason: Won't do: universe view is discovery-oriented with too many authors for grouped mode to be useful

title: Create new grouped-UI topic branch on alltheseas/damus
description: Create a clean topic branch following the topic-branch submission model (commit 9499995). The branch should have logically ordered, bisectable, prefix-mergeable commits addressing grouped UI for NIP-05 domain feeds. Rebased from the old nip05-grouped-ui PR #3392 onto current master. Must follow AGENTS.md requirements: per-commit line counts, regression test proof, no mixed features.

title: Extend grouped UI to favorites views
description: Extend the grouped view mode to the favorites timeline. Allow users to view their favorited notes grouped by author with the same filtering capabilities (time range, keywords, short note filtering, max notes per user).
